proposal_summary: A funding request for $39,600 USD to cover the expenses of relocating Nouns Deli to a high-traffic spot in Prahran Market, Melbourne.

disclosed_entities.name: Nouns Deli
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: We are seeking $39,600 USD to cover relocation expenses, ensuring Nouns Deli remains at the forefront

disclosed_entities.name: Nouns DAO
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: rather than requesting the DAO to purchase the business

claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Funds will be used for shop design, construction, fit-out, branding, signage, and contingency for the Nouns Deli relocation.

claimed_complexity.reason: The proposal is a straightforward off-chain funding request for a real-world business relocation. No technical execution details or smart contract changes are mentioned.
